content.en:
"Yes, I'm going to auction the Innocence Gold!"

Ye Tian replied affirmatively.

Xingyuan Great Ancestor took a deep breath and immediately asked, "Respected Great Ancestor, may I ask how many pieces of Tongtian True Gold do you want to auction?"

At this moment, the tone of the Star Source Great Ancestor became respectful.

"Ten pieces!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"What, ten pieces !!!"

Xingyuan Great Ancestor was extremely shocked, he didn't think it was too little, but he felt that it was too much!

He originally thought that Ye Tian would only have one or two pieces at most, but he didn't expect to take out ten!!!

A top-notch fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, if there were ten pieces of Heavenly Pure Gold, it would definitely not be taken out, or even revealed.

"I'm afraid that this Great Ancestor doesn't understand the true value of Tongtian True Gold, so he took it out for auction!"

Xingyuan Great Ancestor thought to himself.

Since Ye Tian wanted to auction, he naturally wouldn't refuse, so he said, "Okay, our Taichen Auction House is willing to accept your lot." "

Subsequently, Ye Tian signed many agreements with Taichen Auction House, so that ten pieces of Tongtian Zhenjin gold were deposited in Taichen Auction House, and when the auction began, these ten pieces of Tongtian Zhenjin Gold would be auctioned.

......

It didn't take long for the auction to begin, and the Great Ancestors, who had 10,000 Heavenly Realm gold coins, entered the auction venue.

Ye Tian also walked in, and he saw that the Blood Ancestor had also entered.

The Blood Ancestor was able to gather 10,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins, he was really a little curious.

After all, at the beginning, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor didn't even have the resources to impact the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and now his cultivation is not high, where did he get so many resources?

"Blood Ancestor, where did you get the 10,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Blood Ancestor smiled and said, "Endless Great Ancestor, almost all of the Great Ancestors with 10,000 Realm Gold Coins are fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but after I become a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, I can go to a treasure land left by the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, so I have obtained some good things!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

I have to say that it is really good to have a backer, and the Raccoon Blood Ancestor has gained a lot of benefits without spending any energy and risk.

Although he didn't know how many things there were in the treasure land left by the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, it was definitely quite a lot.

The current value of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor may not be inferior to that of an ordinary fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and there are even a lot of life-saving treasures.

Otherwise, the Blood Ancestor would not dare to reveal the secret of his wealth in such a way.

Soon, many great ancestors entered the auction venue one by one.

There were many thrones in the venue, and Ye Tian also sat on one of them.

Not long after, a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform walked onto the auction table.

This Great Ancestor is the female Great Ancestor of Taichen Palace, Xue Yao Great Ancestor, and his energy has converged, but Ye Tian sensed that the other party's strength was far beyond his own.

Obviously, this Xue Yao Great Ancestor is definitely terrifying, and it is not a level that Ye Tian can touch at the moment.

After Xue Yao Ancestor came up, he announced the start of the auction.

The first auction item is worth a lot of money, and it is a main battle spear suitable for the use of fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, the Southel Spear!

This spear used a lot of precious materials, such as the gold of the Heavenly Realm.

This weapon is a good weapon for those high-level fifth-level immeasurable lifeforms who don't have many good weapons.

Xue Yao Great Ancestor introduced: "This Soul Spear can contain the power of the Immeasurable Divine Technique, so as to burst out with even more powerful power, and the starting price is 2,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

Soon, a dozen Great Ancestors began to bid.

"This spear is indeed very good, but it should not be as good as my Escape Shuttle!"

Ye Tian didn't look down on such a spear, and it was only those great ancestors who had broken through to become a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that they would be interested in this spear.

In the end, the spear was auctioned off by a Great Ancestor for 3,500 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins.

Subsequently, each auction item was presented for auction.

Some treasures were attractive enough for Ye Tian, but he did not participate in the auction.

He is too weak now, even if he is rich, he can't bid wildly, otherwise he will definitely be targeted.

Therefore, unless it really helps him too much, he will participate in the auction.

Soon, the treasure that made Ye Tian's heart move was taken out and auctioned.

"Next up in the auction is a set of Crystal Hearts, which are composed of the Crystal Hearts of the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform Crystal Clan's Crystal Clan, and dozens of fourth-stage Crystal Hearts, with a starting price of 10,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

Xue Yao Ancestor introduced.

"Crystal Heart!"

Ye Tian lacked this treasure now, as long as he obtained the Heart of the Crystal, he could cultivate the immeasurable magic technique of the Infinite Feather Armor and intervene to form the Infinite Feather Armor Seed Imprint.

Therefore, he must take this treasure.

However, there are quite a few Great Ancestors who are interested in the Heart of Crystal, so the competition is bound to be extremely fierce.

11,000 gold coins to the heavenly realm!

Fifteen thousand gold coins to the heavenly realm!

20,000 Heavenly Gold Coins!

......

One Great Ancestor bid frantically, but after the price soared to 20,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins, there were many fewer competing Great Ancestors.

Soon, Ye Tian was left to compete with another fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

But when Ye Tian reported 35,000 Tongtian Realm gold coins, the other party gave up directly.

After all, the value of these Crystal Hearts is actually not so high, and it is not worth it to continue to bid at a higher price.

In this way, Ye Tian auctioned off these deceitful hearts, and the cultivation conditions of the Infinite Feather Armor were met.

Next, Ye Tian watched the play, even if he didn't bid for any treasures later, he was satisfied.

Time passed slowly, and more and more treasures were auctioned off one by one.

Ye Tian also saw a lot of rare treasures through this auction, and his knowledge soared.

"My innocent gold, I should be auctioning it soon, right?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for Tongtian Zhenjin to be taken out.

However, Tongtian Zhenjin is not auctioned for ten pieces together, but only one piece is auctioned.

"The next auction is a piece of real gold!"

Xue Yao Great Ancestor displayed a piece of pure gold, attracting the attention of all the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

At this moment, all the great ancestors are moved!

"A piece of Tongtian True Gold, it seems that Taichen Palace is preparing to auction the Tongtian True Gold piece by piece!" Ye Tian said darkly.

It seems that the value of Tongtian Zhenjin is still above his imagination!
